title: MCLN EX35 RF User Short Auto-Adjust Inventory Configuration Guide

center 83548 right 309880 EX35 – RF User Short Auto-Adjust Inventory Configuration Guide   0 0 EX35 – RF User Short Auto-Adjust Inventory Configuration Guide   Table of Contents TOC \o "1-3" \h \z \u 1. GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL Code Setup PAGEREF _Toc1834901798 \h 2 1.1. Enablement System Code PAGEREF _Toc111386348 \h 3 2. Add additional custom codes. PAGEREF _Toc849977171 \h 3 2.1. C-000-EX35 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc1517750278 \h 4 2.2. C-E35 Reason Codes PAGEREF _Toc1524089911 \h 4 2.3. B-331 Additional Parameter Setup PAGEREF _Toc1025478409 \h 6 2.4. Pick Location Determination Zones Needing 0 Adjustment PAGEREF _Toc1942985155 \h 7 3. Add Transaction Parameters EX35 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc740557428 \h 8 3.1. RF Pack Cubed Dir. PAGEREF _Toc1211611686 \h 8 3.2. RF Pick Pack Cart PAGEREF _Toc292050776 \h 12 3.3. RF Pck iLPN Frm Case PAGEREF _Toc1007571417 \h 16 4. Add Task Creation Rules for EX35 Pck Cubed PAGEREF _Toc1545317630 \h 18 5. Add Task Creation Rules for Pack Pick Cart Flow PAGEREF _Toc1746671703 \h 21 6. Add INT1 Allocation Parameter priority 9 PAGEREF _Toc2008873909 \h 23 GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL Code Setup Enablement System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C-000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the following information: 232410 174433 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. right 353276 0 0 Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code p arameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. 344805 151933 Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab . 189290 417782 C heck the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. Add additional custom codes . 138023 631981 Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C- 000- EX35 if it has not been added. Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under th e Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. C-000-EX35 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. C-E35 Reason Codes Navigate to system codes UI. Click Add Populate below information . Save Select C-E35, Select Code IDs Select Add Populate below information . Save Select Parameters Input information below Save Navigate to C- E35 - RSN , confirm drop down menu and configure reason code Save B-331 Additional Parameter Setup Go to the System Codes UI Search for base system code B-331 Select the record and click the Parameters button . In the Parameters page, click Add found at the bottom right of the screen . Populate the new parameter as seen below . Click Save , the new parameter is now created for all Code ID s Pick Location Determination Zones Needing 0 Adjustment To make it so certain pick location determination zones are adjusted to 0 when picked negative B-331 parameter 96-96 needs to be set to Y. Go to the system code B-331 Select Code IDs Select the Code ID corresponding to the pick locat ion determination zone associated with the locations that are wanting to be adjusted to 0 if they go negative from over picking. Go to the Parameters tab . Check parameter 96-96 Clear cache via Cache Administration Add Transaction Parameters EX35 Enablement RF Pack Cubed Dir. Navigate to transactions parameters UI , filter for Pck Cubed* Select Pck Cubed Dir transaction , then select Program Template Select Add and configure below parameters, 508-508 , 509-509 , 510-510 , 511-511 Save Save Confirm Pck Cubed Directed transactions have newly created parameters. Select Edit, check parameters, and save . Please complete configuration for all packed cubed dir transactions that require EX35 RF Pick Pack Cart Navigate to transactions parameters UI, filter for Pick Pack Cart* Select Pck Pick Cart transaction, then select Program Template . Select Add and configure below parameters, 50 3 -50 3 , 50 4 -50 4 , and 505-505 Save Save Select Add and configure below parameter 511-511 Save Confirm Pck Pick Cart transactions have newly created parameters. Select Edit, check parameters for params 503-503, 504-504, 505-505, 511-511 , and save. Save RF Pck iLPN Frm Case Navigate to transactions parameters UI, filter for Pck iLPN Frm Case* Select Pck iLPN From CP transaction . S elect Program Template . Select Add and configure below parameters 511-511 Save Confirm Pck iLPN Frm Case transactions have newly created parameter. Select Edit S ave. Please complete configuration for all Pck iLPN Frm Case transactions that require EX35 . Add Task Creation Rules for EX35 Pck Cubed Navigate to Task creation rules and view into REPL : PTL Replenishment Add below Rule name: Replenishment CP 60 and configure as below for definition and task creation parameters tab. Add below Rule name: Replenishment CP 9 and configure as below for definition and task creation parameters tab s . Add below Rule name: ReplCaseFlow050 and configure as below for definition and task creation parameters tab. Add Task Creation Rules for P ack Pick Cart Flow Navigate to Task creation rules and view into REPL: PTL Replenishment Add below Rule name: Replenishment Active 4 0 and configure as below for definition and task creation parameters tab. Add below Rule name: Replenishment Active 60 and configure as below for definition and task creation parameters tab. Add below Rule name: Replenishment Active Mixed 4050 and configure as below for definition and task creation parameters tab. Add below Rule name: Replenishment Active Mixed 60 and configure as below for definition and task creation parameters tab. Add INT1 Allocation Parameter priority 9 Navigate to Allocation Parameters UI and click on the add button. Add below INT 1 priority 9 type as below. Click save.
